sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Great Southern Bancorp (GSBC) reports Q1 2026 EPS of $1.58
feed.summary: Great Southern Bancorp (GSBC) reported a Q1 2026 net income of $17.5 million, or $1.58 per diluted share, marking an increase from the previous year, partly due to stock buybacks. The company maintained healthy key performance metrics including a ROAE of 10.85% and ROAA of 1.24%, with total loans growing by 2.3% to $4.46 billion. Despite a slight decrease in net interest income due to the cessation of accretion benefits and an increase in non-performing assets to $10.1 million, the bank emphasized strong capital ratios and managed credit quality.

feed.title: Westwood Holdings Group (NYSE:WHG) Director Susan Byrne Sells 1,500 Shares
feed.summary: Westwood Holdings Group (NYSE:WHG) Director Susan Byrne recently sold 1,500 shares of the company's stock for a total of $24,675.00, reducing her holdings by 0.50%. The company's stock has been trading down, with a market cap of $153.07 million, and recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.15 per share. Analysts have a consensus "Buy" rating on WHG, and institutional investors have been making shifts in their positions.

feed.title: FedEx (NYSE:FDX) EVP Tracy Brightman Sells 16,959 Shares
feed.summary: FedEx EVP Tracy Brightman sold 16,959 shares of FDX stock on April 15th for over $6.16 million, significantly reducing her stake. This transaction, alongside other recent insider sales, raises concerns about near-term selling pressure despite the company's strong quarterly earnings and analyst optimism. FedEx maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with several increasing price targets.

feed.title: Dexcom (DXCM) EVP sells 1,700 shares, still holds 111,204
feed.summary: Michael Jon Brown, Dexcom Inc.'s EVP and Chief Legal Officer, sold 1,700 shares of common stock at $63.04 each through a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following this transaction, Brown still directly owns 111,204 Dexcom shares, which include 77,603 unvested Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) with vesting scheduled through March 8, 2029. The sale, made on April 15, 2026, was part of a plan adopted on November 26, 2025.

feed.title: First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) Insider Sells $120,330.00 in Stock
feed.summary: First Solar insider Kuntal Kumar Verma sold 573 shares of the company's stock on April 15th for a total of $120,330.00, reducing his direct holdings by 6.07%. This transaction was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The stock traded down about 1.8% on the report, and analysts currently rate First Solar with a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: News Corp Details US$1bn Share Buy-Back of Nasdaq-Listed Stock
feed.summary: News Corp has announced a daily buy-back program to repurchase up to US$1 billion of its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. This initiative, part of their 2025 Repurchase Program, aims to optimize the company's capital structure and enhance shareholder value. The buy-back explicitly excludes ASX-listed CHESS Depositary Interests, focusing returns on the U.S.-listed equity.

feed.title: Align Technology’s Global Innovator Streak And What It Means For Valuation
feed.summary: Align Technology (NasdaqGS:ALGN) has been recognized as a Top 100 Global Innovator for the fifth consecutive year by LexisNexis, highlighting its strong focus on R&D and patent portfolio. Despite recent stock gains, analysts suggest the company is undervalued, trading below its consensus target and estimated fair value. However, significant insider selling has been noted as a potential caution signal for investors.

feed.title: Alliant Energy (LNT) EVP has 1,259 shares withheld for RSU taxes
feed.summary: Alliant Energy's Executive Vice President, Antonio P. Smyth, had 1,259 shares of common stock withheld by the company. This action was taken to cover tax obligations related to the vesting and settlement of his restricted stock units, and it does not represent an open-market sale. Following this transaction, Smyth directly holds 20,678 shares of Alliant Energy stock.

feed.title: Intapp Shares Surge 8.9% - Analysts Weigh In
feed.summary: Intapp Inc.'s stock surged by 8.9% to $23.05 after its latest earnings report showed better-than-expected revenue. Despite this, analysts have mixed views on the company's future, with price targets ranging from $25 to $54 and ratings from 'Sell' to 'Buy'. The company provides cloud-based software for professional services and its stock volatility reflects ongoing uncertainty about its growth and profitability.

feed.title: Bank Of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) Margin Strength Backs Bullish Narratives Heading Into Q1 2026
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) is entering Q1 2026 with strong financial performance, evidenced by increased net income margins (26.5% from 23.5%) and significant earnings growth, despite more modest revenue growth. While bullish narratives are supported by historical profitability, analysts forecast slower future earnings growth, and the stock's current P/E ratio and dividend yield suggest investors are valuing current profitability over high growth expectations. The article encourages investors to analyze these factors to determine BK's potential.

feed.title: GE HealthCare expands mammography collaboration with RadNet’s DeepHealth subsidiary to extend global
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has expanded its collaboration with RadNet's DeepHealth subsidiary to globally advance and commercialize AI-powered mammography tools, including DeepHealth’s new AI-powered Breast Suite. This partnership aims to enhance breast cancer screening workflows, improve detection rates, and increase operational efficiency by integrating AI solutions with GE HealthCare’s mammography systems. The initiative will also introduce new applications like ProFound Pro and Safeguard Review, and will be showcased at the SBI’s 2026 Breast Cancer Imaging Symposium.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences exec Mercier sells $422k in stock
feed.summary: Johanna Mercier, Chief Comm & Corp Aff Officer at Gilead Sciences, sold 3,000 shares of common stock for $422,880 on April 15, 2026, under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This transaction leaves Mercier with 128,779 direct shares. The company has also expanded access to its HIV prevention drug, lenacapavir, and enhanced its oncology pipeline through a collaboration with Tempus AI, while analysts have maintained positive ratings and price targets.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences CFO Dickinson sells $422k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Andrew D. Dickinson, CFO of Gilead Sciences, sold 3,000 shares of company stock for a total of $422,880 on April 15, 2026. This transaction was executed under a pre-arranged trading plan, with the stock currently valued at $138.49 and having provided a 36% return over the past year. The company has also raised its dividend for 11 consecutive years and is trading near its Fair Value according to InvestingPro.

feed.title: Unilever hikes price of Hellmann’s mayonnaise as suppliers try to offset rising fuel costs
feed.summary: Unilever is increasing the price it charges retailers for Hellmann's mayonnaise by 9%, effective in early July, due to a "significant increase" in its costs, particularly rising fuel prices impacting global supply chains. This move reflects a broader trend among suppliers in Canada and globally who are implementing surcharges or price hikes to cover escalating transportation expenses. While some major grocers are pushing back against these increases, smaller independent retailers are expected to bear a disproportionate burden.

feed.title: The Walt Disney Studios and Global Theatrical Exhibition Partners Launch 'Infinity Vision' — The Ultimate Premium Moviegoing Experience
feed.summary: The Walt Disney Studios announced the launch of "Infinity Vision," a new certification for premium large format (PLF) theaters, in collaboration with global theatrical exhibition partners. This initiative aims to help audiences identify auditoriums offering the biggest, brightest, and most immersive cinematic experiences through rigorous technical standards, including large screens, laser projection, and premium audio. Beginning with the re-release of Marvel Studios’ Avengers: Endgame and the upcoming Avengers: Doomsday, audiences can seek out Infinity Vision-certified screens for an optimal viewing experience.

feed.title: AWS launches AI-driven tool to speed up early-stage antibody discovery
feed.summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has launched Amazon Bio Discovery, an AI-powered drug discovery tool designed to accelerate the early-stage development of antibody therapies. This new agentic AI application provides scientists with access to specialized biological foundation models and allows them to use natural language to design and test novel drugs, aiming to overcome the challenges of integrating complex AI models into research. The platform has already demonstrated significant time savings in antibody design for Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center, reducing a year-long process to just weeks.

feed.title: Trinity Industries Inc (TRN) Stock Down 3.0% but Still Overvalued -- GF Score: 69/100
feed.summary: Trinity Industries Inc (TRN) shares dropped 3.0% to $32.47, a price GuruFocus identifies as significantly overvalued compared to its intrinsic GF Value™ of $22.40. Despite a GF Score™ of 69/100, indicating above-average potential, concerns arise from its low financial strength (4/10) and limited growth prospects (2/10). Investors are cautioned due to the substantial premium over its GF Value™.

feed.title: Werner Enterprises Inc (WERN) Stock Up 5.4% and Still Undervalued -- GF Score: 84/100
feed.summary: Werner Enterprises Inc (WERN) saw its stock rise by 5.4% to $32.49, marking a 19.7% increase over the past month. Despite this, GuruFocus assesses the company as "Modestly Undervalued" with a GF Value™ of $38.35, indicating a potential upside of 15.3%. The company holds a strong GF Score™ of 84/100, driven by high valuation, profitability, and growth scores, although its Financial Strength is rated lower at 5/10, and insiders have been selling shares.

feed.title: Archer Daniels Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) Short Interest Down 17.1% in March
feed.summary: Archer Daniels Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) saw a 17.1% decrease in short interest during March, falling to 13,081,635 shares by March 31st, representing 2.7% of its shares short. The company recently beat quarterly EPS estimates but its revenue fell, and analysts hold a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $63.86. ADM also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.52 per share.

feed.title: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust re-elects board and ratifies auditor at annual meeting
feed.summary: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (NYSE:KREF) held its 2026 Annual Meeting, re-electing all eight directors and ratifying Deloitte & Touche LLP as its independent auditor. Shareholders also approved the advisory compensation for named executive officers. The company is currently trading at $6.62 with a 15% dividend yield, though InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be overvalued.

feed.title: Telkom, PGN partner on green digital infrastructure for data centers
feed.summary: State-owned enterprises PT Telkom Indonesia Tbk and PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk (PGN) have formed a partnership to integrate digital infrastructure with low-carbon energy, specifically to support green data centers in Indonesia. Telkom will develop data centers using low-emission energy, with PGN supplying biomethane derived from palm oil waste. This collaboration aims to enhance efficiency, promote sustainable value, and solidify Indonesia's position as a regional digital hub.

feed.title: WEBTOON (WBTN) Chief Product Officer reports stock, options and RSUs
feed.summary: WEBTOON Entertainment Inc.'s CPO, Chae Yuki, has filed an initial ownership report detailing a direct holding of 149,822 common stock shares. The filing also outlines several stock option positions with varying exercise prices and expiration dates, alongside restricted stock units (RSUs) that are set to vest in installments between May 2026 and May 2028, contingent on continued employment. This report provides transparency on the executive's equity compensation in the company.

feed.title: |‘New Corteva’ Names Luke Kissam CEO—As Corteva Sets to Split Later This Year
feed.summary: |Corteva Inc., headquartered in Indianapolis, has appointed Luther "Luke" Kissam as CEO of "New Corteva," the crop protection company set to form after Corteva's split into two public entities later this year. Kissam, previously CEO of Albemarle Corp., will join on June 1 and assume his new role after the separation in Q4 2026. The restructuring aims to create distinct, innovation-focused companies, with New Corteva concentrating on crop protection and a second entity, SpinCo, focusing on seeds and genetics, to be led by current Corteva CEO Chuck Magro.

feed.title: Vicor Corp (VICR) Stock Up 4.5% but GF Value Says Overvalued -- GF Score: 83/100
feed.summary: Vicor Corp (VICR) shares rose 4.5% to $203.10 but are considered significantly overvalued by the GF Value™ at $57.10, indicating a lack of margin of safety. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 83/100, driven by excellent Financial Strength and Growth, the Valuation rank is very low at 1/10. Insider selling of $170.3 million over the past three months, with no buying, further suggests a bearish outlook from insiders on the current valuation.

feed.title: Vista Energy SAB de CV (VIST) Shares Surge 4.5% -- What GF Score of 86 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Vista Energy SAB de CV (VIST) experienced a 4.5% share surge, driven by its Strong GF Score™ of 86/100, which indicates robust performance. Despite trading above its historical P/E, the stock is currently considered "Modestly Undervalued" by GuruFocus' GF Value™ metric. Investors are advised to consider the company's strong growth and valuation scores against its lower financial strength rating, while noting the absence of recent insider transactions.

feed.title: Exxon pulls offer to sell two initial Golden Pass LNG cargoes - Reuters (XOM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil has reportedly withdrawn its offer to sell two initial cargoes of liquefied natural gas from its Golden Pass export plant in Texas. The plant has been in the process of starting up operations. This development was reported by Reuters.

feed.title: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (TRV) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript Summary
feed.summary: This document contains a summary of the Q1 2026 earnings call transcript for The Travelers Companies, Inc. (TRV). It provides key insights and financial performance details discussed during the call.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Names UnitedHealth Stock (UNH) a Top Pick ahead of Q1 Earnings – Here’s Why
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has named UnitedHealth (UNH) a top pick ahead of its Q1 earnings report, with five-star analyst Erin Wright reiterating a Buy rating and a $375 price target. Wright believes sentiment in the managed-care sector is improving, driven by clearer visibility into Medicare Advantage reimbursement for 2026 and growing conviction in the Optum Health turnaround. The company is expected to report Q1 revenue of $109.52 billion and earnings of $6.60 per share, with investors focusing on Medicare Advantage margins, medical cost trends, and updates on Optum Health.

feed.title: Top Stock Reports for NVIDIA, Apple & Coca-Cola
feed.summary: Zacks Research Daily has released new research reports on 16 major stocks, including NVIDIA, Apple, and Coca-Cola, highlighting their recent performance and future outlook. The reports emphasize NVIDIA's AI growth despite supply concerns, Apple's strong iPhone and Services revenue, and Coca-Cola's robust portfolio and dividend growth. The analysis also covers micro-cap stocks Universal Health Realty Income and The Cato Corp., detailing their financial health and market position.

feed.title: NI Stock Edges Higher After-Hours On Deals With Alphabet, Amazon
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. (NI) saw its stock rise after announcing new and expanded deals with Alphabet and Amazon Data Services. The agreements involve supporting a large-scale data center in northern Indiana for Alphabet and accelerating site energization for Amazon, which is expected to generate significant savings for customers. These partnerships aim to deliver reliable energy solutions and improve grid reliability while supporting rapid data center growth.

feed.title: UD, Exelon report bolsters case for vehicle-to-grid tech creating ‘virtual power plants’
feed.summary: A new report from the University of Delaware (UD), Exelon Corporation/Delmarva Power, and collaborators indicates that vehicle-to-grid (V2G) technology can generate significant profits for businesses and consumers, effectively offsetting the higher cost of electric vehicles (EVs). A pilot program demonstrated that a V2G passenger EV could earn up to $3,359 annually, and heavier fleet vehicles over $9,000, by supplying energy to the electric grid, essentially turning parked EVs into "virtual power plants." The research also confirmed that V2G operation did not negatively impact battery health, bolstering the case for wider adoption of this grid-stabilizing technology.

feed.title: VEON Ltd (VEON) Stock Up 3.3% but GF Value Says Overvalued -- GF Score: 73/100
feed.summary: VEON Ltd (VEON) shares rose 3.3% to $54.43, but GuruFocus's GF Value suggests the stock is 65.6% overvalued, with its current price significantly higher than its intrinsic value estimate of $32.86. Despite a GF Score of 73/100 indicating above-average quality, the valuation rank is low (3/10), and there has been no insider trading activity in the last three months, cautioning investors about potential risks at the current price. Investors are advised to exercise caution due to the lack of a margin of safety and elevated P/E ratio compared to historical levels.

feed.title: Billy Now Available on Trimble Marketplace, Helping Contractors Manage COIs and Compliance More Efficiently
feed.summary: Billy, a construction insurance compliance software leader, has announced its availability on the Trimble Marketplace. This integration aims to help contractors manage Certificates of Insurance (COIs) and compliance more efficiently by automating COI tracking and monitoring within existing digital workflows. The partnership provides Trimble users with a verified solution to mitigate project risk and improve insurance compliance for subcontractors and vendors.

feed.title: Raytheon (RTX) Secures $904.6 Million Contract Modification
feed.summary: Raytheon Missiles and Defense, a division of RTX Corp (NYSE: RTX), has secured a significant $904.6 million contract modification for the low-rate initial production of the Lower Tier Air and Missile Defense System. This brings the total contract value to approximately $5.36 billion, highlighting the U.S. Army's commitment to enhancing defense capabilities. Despite RTX's strong GF Score and growth, its high P/E ratio and recent insider selling suggest potential overvaluation, advising caution for investors.

feed.title: GE Aerospace Pentagon Talks Put Defense Growth And GE Valuation In Focus
authors: Simply Wall St Reviewed by Bailey Pemberton
feed.summary: GE Aerospace is reportedly in preliminary discussions with the Pentagon to increase U.S. defense production capacity, indicating a potential military focus for the company amidst rising global defense budgets. These talks could influence GE's capital allocation and product strategy, particularly for its jet engine and defense technology segments. Investors are watching to see if these early conversations lead to formal programs or contracts, which could impact the company's valuation and balance sheet.

feed.title: Assessing Kraft Heinz (KHC) Valuation After Restaurant Edition Launch And Marketing Push
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz (KHC) has launched a new "Restaurant Edition" of its Mac & Cheese, aiming to boost its market position amidst recent stock price declines. Despite this and other marketing efforts, KHC's stock has seen an 18.42% drop over one year and 33.03% over three years. Various valuation models present differing outlooks, with a popular narrative suggesting it's 7% undervalued at $24.29 per share, while a DCF model indicates a fair value of $60.66, highlighting a significant disconnect in market perception and potential risks to execution.

feed.title: Honeywell International (HON) director converts 625 RSUs into shares
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. director Duncan Angove converted 625 restricted stock units (RSUs) into an equal number of common shares on April 15, 2026, under the 2016 Stock Plan for Non-Employee Directors. This transaction, which included 13 additional units from reinvested dividend equivalents, increased his direct holdings to 3,608 shares of HON common stock. The filing, reported as a moderate and neutral impact, indicates no sale of shares.

feed.title: Barry Sternlicht (STWD) logs 3,741-share internal restructuring, holds 14.3M directly
feed.summary: Barry Sternlicht, CEO and Chairman of STARWOOD PROPERTY TRUST, INC. (STWD), reported an internal restructuring involving 3,741 shares of common stock attributed to controlled entities. This transaction, coded as an "other" entry, had no open-market buying or selling. Following this, Sternlicht controls 3,297,964 shares indirectly and holds 14,296,027 shares directly, though he disclaims beneficial ownership beyond his pecuniary interest for the indirectly held shares.

feed.title: Honeywell International Inc. (HON) director exercises 625 RSUs into stock
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. director Kevin Burke exercised 625 restricted stock units (RSUs) into common shares on April 15, 2026. This conversion, including 13 dividend-equivalent RSUs, resulted in 625 shares of common stock at $230.93 per share, increasing Burke's direct holdings to 29,532 shares. The transaction represents a routine vesting under the company's 2016 Stock Plan for Non-Employee Directors and did not involve any sale of shares.

feed.title: Honeywell (HON) director Robin Watson settles 625 RSUs with share tax withholding
feed.summary: Honeywell International director Robin Watson settled 625 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), including 13 from dividend reinvestment, which converted into common stock. Of the 625 shares, 188 were withheld for tax obligations at a reference price of $230.93 per share. This was a routine, compensation-related event under Honeywell's 2016 Stock Plan for Non-Employee Directors, resulting in Watson holding 1,493 common shares directly after the transaction.

feed.title: JPMorgan Raises Price Target for Republic Services to 245 Dollars
feed.summary: JPMorgan increased its price target for Republic Services (RSG) to $245 from $233, maintaining a Neutral rating. This came during a first-quarter preview, with analysts citing recent Class 8 truck orders as a sign of potential growth for late 2026. Other firms like Wells Fargo and Wolfe Research have also adjusted their outlooks on the company, with Wells Fargo raising its target to $252 and Wolfe Research initiating coverage with a Peer Perform rating.

feed.title: A Look at The Mosaic Co (MOS) After 4.2% Gain -- GF Value $29.26 vs Price $24.73
feed.summary: The Mosaic Co (MOS) shares recently gained 4.2%, but at $24.73, the stock is still considered modestly undervalued by GuruFocus, with a GF Value™ of $29.26. Despite its undervaluation and a GF Score™ of 72/100, concerns exist regarding its low growth ranking (2/10) and its current P/E ratio of 14.6x, which is above its 5-year median. Investors are advised to consider these mixed signals, along with the absence of recent insider trading, before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Honeywell (HON) director converts 625 RSUs and now holds 11,968 shares
feed.summary: Honeywell International director William S. Ayer converted 625 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into common shares, increasing his direct equity stake. The conversion occurred on April 15, 2026, at a stated transaction price of $230.93 per share, bringing his total direct holdings to 11,968 shares. This transaction stems from the company's 2016 Stock Plan for Non-Employee Directors, with the RSUs vesting on the conversion date.

feed.title: Honeywell (NYSE: HON) director converts 625 RSUs into common stock
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. director Stephen Williamson converted 625 restricted stock units (RSUs) into 625 shares of common stock on April 15, 2026, at a transaction price of $230.93 per share. These RSUs vested under Honeywell’s 2016 Stock Plan for Non-Employee Directors and included 13 additional units from reinvested dividend equivalents. Following this transaction, Williamson directly holds 789 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Cactus Foods Launches in 320+ Kroger Locations Nationwide, Expanding Retail Footprint and Bringing Bold, Better-for-You Snacking to More Consumers
feed.summary: Cactus Foods has expanded its presence into over 320 Kroger locations nationwide, including banners like Ralphs, Fry’s, and Fred Meyer, as part of Kroger's Innovation Program. The brand's Cactus Crunch tortilla chips, made with nopal cactus, corn, spinach, and flaxseed, are positioned in Natural & Organic endcaps. This expansion aims to introduce more consumers to their gluten-free, vegan, and non-GMO snacking options, building on its recognition since launching in 2024.

feed.title: J M Smucker (SJM) director David V. Singer files initial Form 3 ownership report
feed.summary: J.M. Smucker Co. director David V. Singer has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership (Form 3) with the SEC. The filing indicates no reported transactions, derivative positions, or existing share holdings for Singer at the time of the report. This Form 3 establishes his role as a director without current direct equity ownership or trading activity.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy appoints Michael A. "Casey" Herman to Board of Directors
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy has appointed Michael A. "Casey" Herman to its Board of Directors, effective April 16, 2026. Herman brings extensive experience in audit, governance, strategic planning, and long-term financing within the utility sector, having previously led the U.S. Utility & Power Sector and Sustainability practices at PricewaterhouseCoopers. His appointment is part of the company's ongoing board refreshment process and is expected to support CenterPoint's growth strategy and capital investment plans.

feed.title: CenterPoint taps former PwC utility leader for board amid $65.5B plan
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy has appointed Michael A. "Casey" Herman, a former PwC utility leader with nearly 40 years of experience, to its Board of Directors, effective April 16, 2026. This appointment supports CenterPoint's board refreshment process and its 10-year, $65.5 billion capital investment plan aimed at enhancing system resilience, reliability, and safety. Herman's expertise in audit, governance, strategic planning, and long-term financing is expected to contribute to the company's long-term growth objectives.

feed.title: NiSource rises after signing data center deals with Google, Amazon (NI:NYSE)
feed.summary: NiSource (NI) stock rose 2.4% in post-market trading after announcing energy infrastructure agreements with Google (Alphabet) and Amazon. These deals are intended to support the development of new data centers in Indiana. The utility firm has secured a new long-term energy supply agreement as part of these collaborations.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Adam Laponis Sells 3,000 Shares of Twist Bioscience Corp (TWST)
feed.summary: Adam Laponis, the CFO of Twist Bioscience Corp (TWST), sold 3,000 shares of the company on April 14, 2026. This transaction adds to his previous sales over the past year, with no insider buys recorded for the company during that period. Currently, TWST is trading at $55 per share, indicating it is modestly overvalued according to GuruFocus's intrinsic value estimate of $43.22.
